brief_notes: Well-organized paper with clear presentation of the CryoTEN architecture and comprehensive evaluation. Specific quantitative results are provided for FSC improvements (3.55 to 2.45 Angstrom, 30.99% improvement). The multi-metric evaluation (FSC, CC, Q-score) and de novo modeling assessment across 700 chains are rigorous. The Gaussian target map formula is clearly specified. Some tables still use qualitative entries ('Baseline', 'Improved') where numbers would strengthen the paper. Computational efficiency comparison is a practical strength. Good discussion of the speed-quality tradeoff.
